calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2007 Continued To Jan-18-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
